如何在AFSIM中配置和使用消息传递系统？

# AFSIM消息传递系统配置和使用

# 消息定义
message detection_report WSF_MESSAGE
  # 消息类型标识
  type DETECTION_REPORT
  
  # 消息字段定义
  field track_id integer
  field position vector3d
  field velocity vector3d
  field detection_time double
  field confidence double
  field classification string
  
  # 消息大小限制
  max_size 256 bytes
  
  # 优先级
  priority HIGH
  
  # 可靠性
  reliability RELIABLE
  # 或 UNRELIABLE, BEST_EFFORT
  
  # 生存时间
  time_to_live 5.0 seconds
end_message

message fire_command WSF_MESSAGE
  type FIRE_COMMAND
  field target_id integer
  field weapon_type string
  field launch_time double
  field impact_point vector3d
  priority CRITICAL
  reliability RELIABLE
  time_to_live 1.0 seconds
end_message

message status_update WSF_MESSAGE
  type STATUS_UPDATE
  field platform_status string
  field fuel_level double
  field ammunition_count integer
  priority NORMAL
  reliability UNRELIABLE
  time_to_live 10.0 seconds
end_message

# 消息处理器
processor message_handler WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state receive_messages
    on_entry
      # 订阅消息类型
      PROCESSOR.SubscribeToMessage("DETECTION_REPORT")
      PROCESSOR.SubscribeToMessage("FIRE_COMMAND")
      PROCESSOR.SubscribeToMessage("STATUS_UPDATE")
    end_on_entry
    
    on_evaluate
      # 检查并处理接收到的消息
      while MESSAGE.IsAvailable() do
        local msg = MESSAGE.GetNext()
        
        if msg.GetType() == "DETECTION_REPORT" then
          PROCESSOR.HandleDetectionReport(msg)
        elseif msg.GetType() == "FIRE_COMMAND" then
          PROCESSOR.HandleFireCommand(msg)
        elseif msg.GetType() == "STATUS_UPDATE" then
          PROCESSOR.HandleStatusUpdate(msg)
        end
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
  
  state send_detection
    on_entry
      # 创建检测报告消息
      local report = MESSAGE.Create("DETECTION_REPORT")
      
      # 设置字段值
      report.SetField("track_id", TRACK.Id())
      report.SetField("position", TRACK.Position())
      report.SetField("velocity", TRACK.Velocity())
      report.SetField("detection_time", TIME_NOW)
      report.SetField("confidence", TRACK.Confidence())
      report.SetField("classification", TRACK.Classification())
      
      # 发送消息到指定接收者
      local recipients = PLATFORM.GetCommandNetwork()
      foreach recipient in recipients do
        PLATFORM.SendMessage(recipient, report)
      end
      
      # 或广播到网络
      PLATFORM.BroadcastMessage("tactical_net", report)
    end_on_entry
    
    next_state receive_messages
      true
    end_next_state
  end_state
  
  state process_fire_command
    on_entry
      # 解析开火命令
      local cmd = MESSAGE.GetCurrent()
      local target_id = cmd.GetField("target_id")
      local weapon_type = cmd.GetField("weapon_type")
      local launch_time = cmd.GetField("launch_time")
      
      # 验证命令
      if PLATFORM.IsValidTarget(target_id) && PLATFORM.HasWeapon(weapon_type) then
        # 确认接收
        local ack = MESSAGE.Create("COMMAND_ACK")
        ack.SetField("original_command", cmd.GetId())
        ack.SetField("status", "ACCEPTED")
        PLATFORM.SendMessage(cmd.GetSender(), ack)
        
        # 执行命令
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("fire_target", target_id)
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("fire_weapon", weapon_type)
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("fire_time", launch_time)
      else
        # 拒绝命令
        local nack = MESSAGE.Create("COMMAND_NACK")
        nack.SetField("original_command", cmd.GetId())
        nack.SetField("status", "REJECTED")
        nack.SetField("reason", "Invalid target or weapon")
        PLATFORM.SendMessage(cmd.GetSender(), nack)
      end
    end_on_entry
    
    next_state execute_fire
      TIME_NOW >= PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("fire_time")
    end_next_state
  end_state
end_processor

# 通信链路消息路由
communication tactical_radio WSF_RADIO_TRANSCEIVER
  # 网络配置
  network "tactical_net"
  address "192.168.1.10/24"
  
  # 消息路由配置
  routing_table
    # 目标网络 -> 下一跳
    "command_net", "192.168.1.1"
    "air_net", "192.168.2.1"
    "ground_net", "192.168.3.1"
  end_routing_table
  
  # 消息过滤
  message_filter
    allow "DETECTION_REPORT"
    allow "FIRE_COMMAND"
    allow "STATUS_UPDATE"
    deny "DEBUG_INFO"
    deny "TEST_MESSAGE"
  end_message_filter
  
  # 消息队列管理
  message_queue
    high_priority_size 50
    normal_priority_size 100
    low_priority_size 200
    
    # 队列满时的处理策略
    overflow_strategy DROP_OLDEST
    # 或 DROP_NEWEST, REJECT_NEW
  end_message_queue
  
  # 消息压缩
  compression true
  compression_threshold 1024 bytes  # 大于1KB的消息启用压缩
end_communication

# 外部链接消息（external_link）
# 用于与外部系统通信
processor external_comm WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state send_external
    on_entry
      # 创建外部消息
      local ext_msg = MESSAGE.CreateExternal()
      ext_msg.SetProtocol("C2SIM")
      ext_msg.SetDestination("command_center")
      
      # 设置内容
      ext_msg.SetContent({
        message_type: "GroundTruthReport",
        timestamp: TIME_NOW,
        unit_id: PLATFORM.GetId(),
        position: {
          x: PLATFORM.GetWCSPosition().X(),
          y: PLATFORM.GetWCSPosition().Y(),
          z: PLATFORM.GetWCSPosition().Z()
        },
        status: "OPERATIONAL"
      })
      
      # 发送
      PLATFORM.SendExternalMessage(ext_msg)
    end_on_entry
  end_state
  
  state receive_external
    on_evaluate
      if MESSAGE.IsExternalAvailable() then
        local ext_msg = MESSAGE.GetNextExternal()
        
        if ext_msg.GetProtocol() == "C2SIM" then
          local content = ext_msg.GetContent()
          
          if content.message_type == "Order" then
            PROCESSOR.ProcessOrder(content)
          elseif content.message_type == "Request" then
            PROCESSOR.ProcessRequest(content)
          end
        end
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
end_processor

# 消息时间戳和排序
processor ordered_messages WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state handle_ordered
    on_entry
      # 初始化消息缓冲区
      PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("message_buffer", [])
      PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("last_processed_time", 0.0)
    end_on_entry
    
    on_evaluate
      # 接收新消息并加入缓冲区
      while MESSAGE.IsAvailable() do
        local msg = MESSAGE.GetNext()
        local buffer = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("message_buffer")
        buffer.Add(msg)
        
        # 按时间戳排序
        buffer.SortByTimestamp()
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("message_buffer", buffer)
      end
      
      # 处理按顺序到达的消息
      local buffer = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("message_buffer")
      local last_time = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("last_processed_time")
      
      while buffer.Size() > 0 && buffer.GetFirst().GetTimestamp() <= TIME_NOW do
        local msg = buffer.RemoveFirst()
        PROCESSOR.ProcessMessage(msg)
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("last_processed_time", msg.GetTimestamp())
      end
      
      PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("message_buffer", buffer)
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
end_processor
你是一个专业的AFSIM仿真建模专家，精通WSF框架的脚本编写和任务处理器配置。
如何在AFSIM中配置雷达的检测概率计算（Marcum-Swerling模型）？

# 雷达检测概率计算（Marcum-Swerling模型）配置

sensor radar_with_detection WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
  # 基本雷达参数
  location 0 0 0 meters
  
  transmitter xmit
    power 1000000
    frequency 3000 MHz
    pulse_width 1 microseconds
    pulse_repetition_frequency 1000 Hz
    antenna_pattern radar_ant
  end_transmitter
  
  receiver recv
    bandwidth 1 MHz
    noise_figure 3.0 dB
    antenna_pattern radar_ant
  end_receiver
  
  # 信号处理参数
  pulse_compression_ratio 100
  integration_gain 15.0 dB
  
  # 检测机制选择
  # 选项1：简单的二元检测器（使用固定阈值）
  # detection_threshold 13.0 dB
  
  # 选项2：Marcum-Swerling检测器（基于检测概率）
  detector_type MARCUM_SWERLING
  
  # Swerling目标起伏模型
  swerling_case SWERLING_1
  # 选项：
  # SWERLING_0 - 无起伏（恒定RCS）
  # SWERLING_1 - 慢起伏，瑞利分布（扫描间起伏）
  # SWERLING_2 - 快起伏，瑞利分布（脉冲间起伏）
  # SWERLING_3 - 慢起伏，卡方分布（4自由度）
  # SWERLING_4 - 快起伏，卡方分布（4自由度）
  # SWERLING_5 - 用户定义的起伏统计
  
  # 检测性能要求
  probability_of_false_alarm 1.0e-6    # 虚警概率
  probability_of_detection 0.9         # 检测概率要求（90%）
  
  # 脉冲积累数量
  number_of_pulses_integrated 10
  
  # 检测器定律
  detector_law SQUARE_LAW
  # 或 LINEAR_LAW, LOG_LAW
  
  # 自适应阈值（CFAR）
  cfar_type CA_CFAR                    # 单元平均CFAR
  # 或 GO_CFAR, SO_CFAR, OS_CFAR
  cfar_reference_cells 16
  cfar_guard_cells 2
  cfar_threshold_factor 15.0 dB
end_sensor

# 检测概率计算脚本
processor detection_calculator WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state calculate_detection
    on_entry
      # 获取雷达参数
      local radar = PLATFORM.GetSensor("main_radar")
      
      # 计算接收功率（使用雷达方程）
      # Pr = Ppeak * (Gx/Lx) * (Axt/(4*pi*Rxt^2)) * sigma * (Atr/(4*pi*Rtr^2)) * (lambda^2/(4*pi)) * (Gr/Lr) * F40 * Fbw * Fpol
      
      local peak_power = radar.GetPeakPower()
      local tx_gain = radar.GetTransmitGain()
      local tx_loss = radar.GetTransmitLoss()
      local range = TRACK.Range()
      local rcs = TRACK.GetRCS()
      local wavelength = radar.GetWavelength()
      local rx_gain = radar.GetReceiveGain()
      local rx_loss = radar.GetReceiveLoss()
      local pulse_compression = radar.GetPulseCompressionRatio()
      local integration_gain = radar.GetIntegrationGain()
      
      # 计算单脉冲SNR
      local single_pulse_snr = (peak_power * tx_gain * rcs * wavelength * wavelength * rx_gain) /
                               (tx_loss * rx_loss * 4 * MATH.PI * 4 * MATH.PI * range * range * range * range * 
                                radar.GetNoisePower())
      
      # 转换为dB
      local single_pulse_snr_db = 10.0 * MATH.Log10(single_pulse_snr)
      
      # 应用信号处理增益
      local processed_snr_db = single_pulse_snr_db + 10.0 * MATH.Log10(pulse_compression) + integration_gain
      
      # 获取Marcum-Swerling参数
      local swerling = radar.GetSwerlingCase()
      local n_pulses = radar.GetNumberOfPulsesIntegrated()
      local pfa = radar.GetProbabilityOfFalseAlarm()
      
      # 计算检测概率
      local pd = 0.0
      
      if swerling == "SWERLING_0" then
        # Swerling 0 (Marcum模型，非起伏目标)
        pd = CalculateMarcumQ(MATH.Sqrt(2.0 * n_pulses * MATH.Pow(10.0, processed_snr_db/10.0)), 
                              MATH.Sqrt(-2.0 * MATH.Log(pfa)))
      elseif swerling == "SWERLING_1" then
        # Swerling 1 (慢起伏)
        pd = CalculateSwerling1(n_pulses, MATH.Pow(10.0, processed_snr_db/10.0), pfa)
      elseif swerling == "SWERLING_2" then
        # Swerling 2 (快起伏)
        pd = CalculateSwerling2(n_pulses, MATH.Pow(10.0, processed_snr_db/10.0), pfa)
      elseif swerling == "SWERLING_3" then
        # Swerling 3 (慢起伏，4自由度)
        pd = CalculateSwerling3(n_pulses, MATH.Pow(10.0, processed_snr_db/10.0), pfa)
      elseif swerling == "SWERLING_4" then
        # Swerling 4 (快起伏，4自由度)
        pd = CalculateSwerling4(n_pulses, MATH.Pow(10.0, processed_snr_db/10.0), pfa)
      end
      
      # 存储计算结果
      TRACK.SetCalculatedSNR(processed_snr_db)
      TRACK.SetDetectionProbability(pd)
      
      # 执行检测判定
      if pd >= radar.GetRequiredDetectionProbability() then
        TRACK.SetDetectionStatus(DETECTED)
        PLATFORM.ReportDetection(TRACK)
      else
        TRACK.SetDetectionStatus(NOT_DETECTED)
      end
    end_on_entry
  end_state
  
  # 辅助函数：Marcum Q函数
  function CalculateMarcumQ(a, b)
    # Q_M(a,b) = exp(-(a^2+b^2)/2) * sum((a/b)^k * I_k(a*b)), k=1-M to inf
    # 简化计算使用近似或查表
    local result = 0.0
    local sum = 0.0
    local max_iter = 50
    
    for k = 0 to max_iter do
      local term = MATH.Pow(a/b, k) * MATH.BesselI(k, a*b)
      sum = sum + term
      if term < 1.0e-10 then break end
    end
    
    result = MATH.Exp(-(a*a + b*b)/2.0) * sum
    return 1.0 - result  # 转换为检测概率
  end_function
  
  # Swerling 1检测概率计算
  function CalculateSwerling1(n, snr, pfa)
    # Pd = exp(-ln(Pfa)/(1+n*SNR))
    local threshold = -MATH.Log(pfa)
    local pd = MATH.Exp(-threshold / (1.0 + n * snr))
    return pd
  end_function
  
  # Swerling 2检测概率计算
  function CalculateSwerling2(n, snr, pfa)
    # Pd = 1 - (1 + SNR)^(-n) * sum((n+k-1)!/(k!(n-1)!) * (threshold/(1+SNR))^k), k=0 to n-1
    local threshold = -MATH.Log(pfa)
    local factor = MATH.Pow(1.0 + snr, -n)
    local sum = 0.0
    
    for k = 0 to n-1 do
      local coeff = MATH.Factorial(n+k-1) / (MATH.Factorial(k) * MATH.Factorial(n-1))
      sum = sum + coeff * MATH.Pow(threshold / (1.0 + snr), k)
    end
    
    return 1.0 - factor * sum
  end_function
end_processor

# 多目标检测管理
processor multi_target_detection WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state scan_and_detect
    on_evaluate
      # 获取当前波束指向的所有潜在目标
      local potential_targets = PLATFORM.GetTargetsInBeam()
      
      foreach target in potential_targets do
        # 计算每个目标的检测概率
        local snr = CalculateSNR(target)
        local pd = CalculateDetectionProbability(snr, target.GetSwerlingCase())
        
        # 随机检测（蒙特卡洛）
        if MATH.Random() < pd then
          # 检测成功
          if !target.IsDetected() then
            # 新检测
            target.SetDetectionTime(TIME_NOW)
            target.SetInitialSNR(snr)
            PLATFORM.ReportNewDetection(target)
          else
            # 更新检测
            target.UpdateSNR(snr)
            target.SetLastContactTime(TIME_NOW)
          end
        else
          # 检测失败
          if target.IsDetected() && (TIME_NOW - target.GetLastContactTime() > 5.0) then
            # 丢失目标
            target.SetDetectionStatus(LOST)
            PLATFORM.ReportLostContact(target)
          end
        end
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
end_processor

  # 任务处理器

end_platform

# 平台脚本控制示例
processor platform_control WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state navigation
    on_evaluate
      # 获取平台状态
      local pos = PLATFORM.GetPosition()
      local vel = PLATFORM.GetVelocity()
      local fuel = PLATFORM.GetFuelLevel()
      local damage = PLATFORM.GetDamageStatus()
      
      # 燃油管理
      if fuel < PLATFORM.GetMaxFuel() * 0.2 then
        PLATFORM.SetMissionPriority(RETURN_TO_BASE)
        PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "LOW_FUEL_WARNING")
      end
      
      # 损伤评估
      if damage.GetCriticalComponentStatus() == DAMAGED then
        PLATFORM.SetMissionPriority(EMERGENCY_LANDING)
        PLATFORM.SendMayday()
      end
      
      # 速度控制
      local target_speed = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("target_speed")
      local current_speed = vel.Magnitude()
      
      if current_speed < target_speed - 10 then
        PLATFORM.IncreaseThrottle(10)
      elseif current_speed > target_speed + 10 then
        PLATFORM.DecreaseThrottle(10)
      end
      
      # 高度控制
      local target_altitude = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("target_altitude")
      local current_altitude = pos.Altitude()
      
      if current_altitude < target_altitude - 100 then
        PLATFORM.SetClimbRate(10)
      elseif current_altitude > target_altitude + 100 then
        PLATFORM.SetClimbRate(-10)
      else
        PLATFORM.SetClimbRate(0)
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
  
  state weapon_employment
    on_entry
      # 检查武器状态
      local weapon_status = PLATFORM.GetWeaponStatus()
      
      if weapon_status.IsReady() then
        local target = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("assigned_target")
        
        if PLATFORM.IsInWeaponRange(target) then
          PLATFORM.EngageTarget(target)
        else
          PLATFORM.CloseToWeaponRange(target)
        end
      end
    end_on_entry
  end_state
end_processor

# 武器挂载和发射控制
processor weapon_control WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
  state weapon_management
    on_entry
      # 初始化武器库
      local weapon_inventory = PLATFORM.GetWeaponInventory()
      
      foreach weapon in weapon_inventory do
        weapon.SetStatus(READY)
        weapon.SetTarget(nil)
      end
    end_on_entry
    
    on_evaluate
      # 检查发射命令
      if MESSAGE.IsFireCommandReceived() then
        local cmd = MESSAGE.GetFireCommand()
        local target = cmd.GetTarget()
        local weapon_type = cmd.GetWeaponType()
        
        # 选择最佳武器
        local selected_weapon = PLATFORM.SelectBestWeapon(target, weapon_type)
        
        if selected_weapon != nil then
          PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("selected_weapon", selected_weapon)
          PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("target", target)
          PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("pre_launch")
        else
          PLATFORM.SendMessage(cmd.GetSender(), "NO_SUITABLE_WEAPON")
        end
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
  
  state pre_launch
    on_entry
      local weapon = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("selected_weapon")
      local target = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("target")
      
      # 检查发射条件
      if !weapon.CheckLaunchConstraints(PLATFORM) then
        PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "LAUNCH_CONSTRAINTS_VIOLATED")
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
        return
      end
      
      # 预热导引头（如果需要）
      if weapon.RequiresSeekerWarmup() then
        weapon.StartSeekerWarmup()
        PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("warmup_end_time", TIME_NOW + weapon.GetWarmupTime())
      else
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("launch")
      end
    end_on_entry
    
    next_state launch
      TIME_NOW >= PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("warmup_end_time")
    end_next_state
  end_state
  
  state launch
    on_entry
      local weapon = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("selected_weapon")
      local target = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("target")
      
      # 最终检查
      if weapon.GetStatus() == READY && PLATFORM.IsInLaunchEnvelope(weapon, target) then
        # 发射武器
        local launched_weapon = PLATFORM.LaunchWeapon(weapon, target)
        
        if launched_weapon != nil then
          # 发射成功
          PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "WEAPON_LAUNCHED")
          
          # 监控武器飞行
          PROCESSOR.SetLocalVariable("launched_weapon", launched_weapon)
          PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_flight")
        else
          PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "LAUNCH_FAILED")
          PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
        end
      else
        PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "LAUNCH_CONDITIONS_NOT_MET")
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
      end
    end_on_entry
  end_state
  
  state weapon_flight
    on_evaluate
      local weapon = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("launched_weapon")
      local target = PROCESSOR.GetLocalVariable("target")
      
      # 更新武器状态
      weapon.UpdateGuidance(target)
      
      # 检查命中
      if weapon.HasImpacted() then
        local outcome = weapon.CalculateDamage(target)
        PLATFORM.ReportWeaponImpact(weapon, target, outcome)
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
      end
      
      # 检查是否丢失目标
      if weapon.HasLostTarget() then
        PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "WEAPON_LOST_TARGET")
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
      end
      
      # 检查自毁（如果飞出范围）
      if weapon.IsOutOfRange() then
        weapon.SelfDestruct()
        PLATFORM.SendMessage("command", "WEAPON_SELF_DESTRUCT")
        PROCESSOR.TransitionToState("weapon_management")
      end
    end_on_evaluate
  end_state
end_processor

# 武器-目标交互计算
function CalculateWeaponOutcome(weapon, target)
  # 计算脱靶距离
  local miss_distance = CalculateMissDistance(weapon, target)
  
  # 检查是否在杀伤范围内
  if miss_distance <= weapon.GetLethalRadius() then
    # 计算杀伤概率
    local pk = weapon.GetBasePk()
    
    # 距离因子
    local range_factor = 1.0 - (miss_distance / weapon.GetLethalRadius()) * 0.2
    
    # 目标机动因子
    local target_g = target.GetCurrentG()
    local maneuver_factor = 1.0 / (1.0 + target_g / 10.0)
    
    # 综合杀伤概率
    local final_pk = pk * range_factor * maneuver_factor
    
    # 随机判定
    if MATH.Random() < final_pk then
      return KILL
    else
      return DAMAGE
    end
  else
    return MISS
  end
end_function
你是一个专业的AFSIM仿真建模专家，精通WSF框架的脚本编写和任务处理器配置。
如何在AFSIM中配置和使用网络通信（Networking）？

# AFSIM网络通信配置

# 网络定义
network tactical_net WSF_NETWORK
  name "Tactical_Network"
  type AD_HOC
  
  # 地址范围（使用CIDR表示法）
  address_range "192.168.1.0/24"
  # 或自动分配：address_range AUTO
  
  # 成员资格规则
  membership
    allow_platform_type AIRCRAFT
    allow_platform_type GROUND_VEHICLE
    allow_side BLUE
    deny_side RED
  end_membership
  
  # 拓扑结构
  topology MESH
  # 或 STAR, BUS, RING, TREE
  
  # 连接性规则
  connectivity
    max_hops 3
    min_link_quality 0.5
    require_line_of_sight false
  end_connectivity
  
  # 网络协议
  protocol IP_BASED
  routing_protocol OLSR
  # 或 AODV, DSR, DSDV
  
  # 服务质量（QoS）
  qos
    priority_class CRITICAL bandwidth 10% latency 10ms
    priority_class HIGH bandwidth 30% latency 50ms
    priority_class NORMAL bandwidth 50% latency 100ms
    priority_class LOW bandwidth 10% latency 500ms
  end_qos
  
  # 安全措施
  security
    encryption AES-256
    authentication CERTIFICATE_BASED
    key_rotation_interval 3600 seconds
  end_security
end_network

# 通信对象配置
communication tactical_radio WSF_RADIO_TRANSCEIVER
  name "Tactical_Radio_1"
  
  # 网络成员资格
  network "tactical_net"
  # 或显式地址：address "192.168.1.10"
  # 或自动获取：address AUTO
  
  # 物理层
  physical_layer
    frequency_band UHF
    frequency_range 300 400 MHz
    channel_bandwidth 25 kHz
    
    modulation FM
    # 或 AM, SSB, PSK, FSK, QAM
    
    power 50 Watts
    sensitivity -110 dBm
    
    # 天线
    antenna_pattern whip_antenna
      type whip
      gain 2.15 dBi
      polarization VERTICAL
    end_antenna_pattern
  end_physical_layer
  
  # 数据链路层
  data_link_layer
    access_protocol CSMA_CA
    # 或 TDMA, FDMA, CDMA, ALOHA
    
    frame_size 1024 bytes
    error_correction HAMMING
    # 或 REED_SOLOMON, CONVOLUTIONAL, TURBO
    
    arq_protocol STOP_AND_WAIT
    # 或 GO_BACK_N, SELECTIVE_REPEAT
  end_data_link_layer
  
  # 网络层
  network_layer
    ip_version IPV4
    routing_protocol OLSR
    
    # 路由表（静态路由）
    static_routes
      "192.168.2.0/24" via "192.168.1.1"
      "192.168.3.0/24" via "192.168.1.2"
    end_static_routes
    
    # 多播支持
    multicast true
    multicast_groups ["224.0.0.1", "224.0.0.2"]
  end_network_layer
  
  # 传输层
  transport_layer
    protocols [TCP, UDP]
    
    # TCP参数
    tcp_window_size 65535
    tcp_congestion_control RENO
    
    # 端口配置
    port_assignments
      5000 "COMMAND_CONTROL"
      5001 "SENSOR_DATA"
      5002 "STATUS_REPORTS"
    end_port_assignments
  end_transport_layer
  
  # 应用层
  application_layer
    message_types
      message_type COMMAND
        priority CRITICAL
        reliability GUARANTEED
        max_latency 100ms
      end_message_type
      
      message_type SENSOR_REPORT
        priority HIGH
        reliability BEST_EFFORT
        max_latency 500ms
      end_message_type
      
      message_type HEARTBEAT
        priority LOW
        reliability UNRELIABLE
        interval 5.0 seconds
      end_message_type
    end_message_types
  end_application_layer
end_communic
